title: DashSword
description: When you do /dashsword it gives you a dash sword which dashes you
body:
# **DashSwordByMas_master31**
DashSword v1.0.0 | Minecraft 1.21.x | Spigot & Paper
> Shift + Right-click with a sword to dash instantly
--------------------------------------------------

**Description**
> DashSword is a lightweight plugin that adds a fast and smooth dash ability to sword combat
> Designed to improve movement, PvP, and overall combat flow
--------------------------------------------------

**Features**
> Instant sword dash (SHIFT + RIGHT-CLICK)
> Works with vanilla swords
> No configuration required (plug-and-play)
> Lightweight and performance friendly
--------------------------------------------------

**Usage**
> Hold SHIFT
> Right-click with a sword
> Dash forward in the direction you are facing
--------------------------------------------------

**Servers**
> Perfect for SMPs, PvP arenas, practice servers, and survival worlds
--------------------------------------------------

**Compatibility**
> Minecraft: 1.21.x
> Loaders: Spigot, Paper
--------------------------------------------------

**Support**
> Need help? Join the Discord
> https://discord.gg/yQ564nqN
--------------------------------------------------
